addItem.description: Tap here to add any item to your inventory — appliances, electronics, furniture, tools. Capture purchase price, serial number, and photos.
addItem.title: Add your first item

navDashboard.description: Your home base. See a summary of total inventory value, warranty statuses, recent items, and key stats at a glance.
navDashboard.title: Dashboard overview

navFiles.description: Upload receipts, manuals, warranty certificates, and photos — all attached directly to items, locations, or areas.
navFiles.title: Attach files

navItems.description: See every item in your inventory. Filter by category, search by name, sort by value — and open any item for full details.
navItems.title: Browse all items

navLocations.description: Structure your inventory by rooms and zones. Create locations like "Kitchen" or "Garage", then divide them into areas.
navLocations.title: Organize by location

navWarranties.description: Never miss an expiring warranty again. {{brand}} tracks every warranty and alerts you before they run out.
navWarranties.title: Track warranties

welcome.description: Your personal home inventory system. Track every item, warranty, file, and receipt — all in one place. Let's take a quick tour.
welcome.title: Welcome to {{brand}}

shell.commandHint: Type at least 2 characters to search.

shortcuts.description: Press a combination to jump around the app. Press ? any time to reopen this list.
shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
